notes: PRC naval exercises in Taiwan Strait with simulated blockade maneuvers, elevating regional tension indicators. Multiple US carrier group repositioning observed.
Missile strikes targeted power substation infrastructure in northeastern Ukraine, resulting in grid disruptions affecting 300,000 residents.
Suspected state-sponsored intrusion detected in Texas power grid SCADA historian; CISA issued advisory. Attribution pending.
IRGC-affiliated group CyberAv3ngers claimed operations against US water utility ICS/SCADA systems as retaliation for regional policy.
Lazarus Group spearphishing campaign targeting South Korean financial institutions and critical infrastructure operators identified by KISA.
Sandworm-linked group compromised BGP routing infrastructure at major German internet exchange point; traffic manipulation detected and isolated.
Water treatment plant in Florida detected unauthorized access to chemical dosing HMI. Incident contained; no impact to treatment operations.
Large-scale protests at UK energy infrastructure sites following government energy policy announcement. No physical damage reported.
